title: Mod Toolkit
body:
Mod Toolkit is an all-in-one mod for several tools. These tools can be used to moderate a minecraft server better or to enhance the play experience.

**What does it include?**

Right now, Mod Toolkit includes several fun features, like:
- A system to track players (Give them a color in the tab list and get notified when they get online/offline)
- A system to note down stuff (Example to remind yourself a task you need to do later)
- A simple display to track an amount of gold in your inventory (Currency of the server)

**Why should you install it?**

Not only does it give extra usefull tools to play with, but is it frequently updated and feedback is taken serious. This way can you enjoy a towny server while the struggles are resolved.
